title: Eglin Battlecard No. 002 — Ashby
summary: Second battlecard ships. Three factual corrections vs the prior draft: Talent Llama is an acquisition closed late 2025 (not a partnership), Custom Agents and Ashby Assistant are open beta (not GA), and People Workflows is the most strategically significant May 7 move — Ashby extending past the ATS boundary into onboarding, 25+ early-access customers. Bias-audit ground remains contested: Ashby has a real third-party audit via FairNow, so Stratum's defensible wins narrow to MCP completeness today (Ashby's MCP still 'upcoming'), continuous governance as architecture (eval set + ledger + Compact refusals), and recruiter-console clarity for buyers who find Ashby over-engineered. Signal Scorecard: L3 · Action Recommended. Pairs with Battlecard 001 for the Compact's differentiation review.
